results.title: DPM, Egyptian FM exchange views on regional situation
results.description: ISLAMABAD - Deputy Prime Minister/Foreign Minister Senator Mohammad Ishaq Dar spoke Sunday with Foreign Minister of Egypt, Badr Abdelatty.

results.title: VD Satheesan To Be Sworn In As Kerala CM Today; 20-Member Cabinet To Take Oath
results.description: Congress leader VD Satheesan will take oath as the Chief Minister of Kerala today along with a 20-member cabinet at the Central Stadium in Thiruvananthapuram. Governor RV Arlekar will administer the oath of office. The new ministry includes leaders from Congress, IUML and allied parties, with 14 fresh faces in the cabinet. Ahead of taking charge, Satheesan announced austerity measures aimed at ending VIP culture and reducing government expenditure in the state. Senior Congress leaders including Mallikarjun Kharge, Rahul Gandhi and Priyanka Gandhi Vadra are expected to attend the ceremony.

results.title: Telangana government to change holiday for Bakrid 2026
results.description: Hyderabad: The Telangana government has announced a holiday for Bakrid 2026, a festival celebrated by Muslims worldwide. As per the Telangana calendar, the government has declared the holiday on May 27.
